samples.xml_description:
Converts parallel input data to serial output. Clock signal. Active-low reset signal. 4-bit parallel data input. Valid signal for serial output. Serial data output. 4 Counter register. Data register. Valid signal register.

Parallel-to-serial conversion is performed by shifting and selecting the appropriate bits from the input data. The most significant bit of the input data is assigned to the output.

When the counter reaches the value N-1, the data register is updated with the parallel input data, and the counter is reset to 0. Otherwise, the counter is incremented by 1, and the data register is shifted left by 1.

The valid signal is set to 1 when the counter reaches N-1 and set to 0 otherwise.

The reset signal is used to reset the counter register to 0.
